APPROVE
Clean Stage 3 foundation: `ExecuteBeadRuntime` carries only plumbing/per-invocation intent, `ExecuteBeadWithConfig` sources durable knobs (Harness, Model, Provider, ModelRef, Effort, ContextBudget, MirrorCfg) from `ResolvedConfig` and delegates to existing `ExecuteBead`, and `NewTestConfigForBead`/`TestBeadOverrides` mirror the loop/run test constructors. Bonus zero-value-panic test enforces the SD-024 sealed-construction inva…
artifact: .ddx/executions/20260425T180522-a61cbc93/reviewer-stream.log

success
Clean Stage 3 foundation: `ExecuteBeadRuntime` carries only plumbing/per-invocation intent, `ExecuteBeadWithConfig` sources durable knobs (Harness, Model, Provider, ModelRef, Effort, ContextBudget, MirrorCfg) from `ResolvedConfig` and delegates to existing `ExecuteBead`, and `NewTestConfigForBead`/`TestBeadOverrides` mirror the loop/run test constructors. Bonus zero-value-panic test enforces the SD-024 sealed-construction invariant on the new path. No callers migrated, consistent with the "add alongside" discipline.
